name: Lemon Rice Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup fresh basil or 1 tablespoon dried basil, minced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a jar with tight-fitting lid, combine the first seven ingredients; shake well.
2. In a large bowl, combine cooked long grain and wild rice; add dressing and toss.
3. Cover and refrigerate overnight.
4. Add cucumbers, green onions, parsley, basil (or dried basil), and pepper; mix well.
5. Chill for 2 hours.
6. Fold in pecans just before serving.
